body.title: Fix adopt_next_ticket: goal_adopt() doesn't accept source_message kwarg
body.result: Dropped source_message kwarg from goal_adopt call at worker_foreman.py:293. Folded engram-pickup marker into task description string. 16/16 tests pass. Commit 8c1caa09.
body.test_plan: After fix: adopt_next_ticket() runs to completion (either goal adopted + chain started, or a legitimate downstream error). Unit: invoke adopt_next_ticket() in isolation against a seeded worker=igor ticket and assert no TypeError on goal_adopt call.
body.description: T-worker-dispatch-validation discovered that worker_foreman.adopt_next_ticket() crashes at first call with: '[ERROR] adopt_next_ticket: goal_adopt() got an unexpected keyword argument source_message'. Site: wild_igor/igor/tools/worker_foreman.py:293-296 calls _goal_adopt(task_desc, source_message=...). ops.goal_adopt() signature (wild_igor/igor/tools/ops.py:174) accepts task_description, goal_id, origin_thread_id, origin_turn_id, origin_question, awaiting_reply, pr_facia_id, parent_goal_facia_id — no source_message. (source_message IS a metadata key set internally by goal_adopt at ops.py:217, but it is not an accepted parameter.) Fix: either drop the kwarg in adopt_next_ticket (simplest — goal_adopt already records task_description as source_message automatically), or pass it via origin_question if the engram-pickup provenance wants to be preserved. Repro: IGOR_HOME_DB_URL=... python3 -c 'from igor.tools.worker_foreman import adopt_next_ticket; print(adopt_next_ticket())' with at least one worker=igor pending ticket in the queue. Blocks T-worker-dispatch-validation end-to-end run.
